02-20.title: NBA ALL-STAR GAME
02-20.subtitle: ALL-STAR GAME MVP · CLEVELAND
02-20.description: Stephen Curry scores 50 points on 16 three-pointers — both All-Star Game records — to win the inaugural Kobe Bryant MVP Award in Cleveland.

02-20.title: WARRIORS vs CLIPPERS
02-20.subtitle: 73-9 SEASON · GAME 54
02-20.description: Klay Thompson scores 32, Draymond Green records a triple-double (18-11-10), and the Warriors improve to 49-5 during their record-breaking 73-win season.

02-20.title: WILLIE MAYS MAKES HISTORY
02-20.subtitle: RECORD $100,000 CONTRACT
02-20.description: Willie Mays signs a record $100,000 contract with the San Francisco Giants, becoming the highest-paid player in Major League Baseball history.

02-21.title: SHARKS vs KINGS
02-21.subtitle: NHL STADIUM SERIES · LEVI'S STADIUM
02-21.description: The first outdoor NHL game in the Bay Area draws 70,205 fans to Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara for the 2015 Coors Light Stadium Series.

02-21.title: WARRIORS vs KINGS
02-21.subtitle: REGULAR SEASON · ORACLE ARENA
02-21.description: Stephen Curry drains 10 three-pointers and scores 36 points as the Warriors hold off the Kings. Kevin Durant adds 28 points and 7 blocks.

02-22.title: WARRIORS vs HAWKS
02-22.subtitle: 73-9 SEASON · FASTEST TO 50 WINS
02-22.description: Curry scores 36 and Klay adds 27 as the Warriors become the fastest team in NBA history to reach 50 wins — doing it in just 55 games, beating the '96 Bulls' record.

02-22.title: EARTHQUAKES vs RSL
02-22.subtitle: MLS SEASON OPENER · PAYPAL PARK
02-22.description: Cristian Espinoza dishes 3 assists as the Earthquakes demolish Real Salt Lake 4-0 in the home opener, kicking off the Bruce Arena era in style.

02-22.title: SANTA CLARA vs WSU
02-22.subtitle: WCC BASKETBALL · NCAA RECORD
02-22.description: The Broncos set a WCC record and tie the NCAA Division I road record with 23 three-pointers (23-of-38) in a 32-point blowout at Washington State.

02-23.title: IGUODALA JERSEY RETIREMENT
02-23.subtitle: NO. 9 RETIRED · CHASE CENTER
02-23.description: The Warriors retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 — the first jersey retirement at Chase Center. Curry scores 30 and Jimmy Butler debuts with 18 in a blowout win over Dallas.

02-24.title: WARRIORS vs HEAT
02-24.subtitle: 73-9 SEASON · 13 LEAD CHANGES IN 4TH QTR
02-24.description: Curry scores 42 and hits the go-ahead three with 38 seconds left. Klay drops 15 consecutive Warriors points in the 4th quarter on his way to 33. Warriors improve to 51-5.

02-24.title: SHARKS vs RED WINGS
02-24.subtitle: REGULAR SEASON · HAT TRICK
02-24.description: Captain Joe Pavelski scores his fifth career hat trick — including two goals 55 seconds apart — as the Sharks rally from a 3-1 deficit to beat Detroit.

02-25.title: WARRIORS vs HORNETS
02-25.subtitle: 3,000TH FRANCHISE WIN
02-25.description: The Warriors demolish Charlotte to become the fifth NBA franchise to reach 3,000 regular-season wins, joining the Lakers, Celtics, Knicks, and 76ers.

02-25.title: MARLEAU NO. 12 RETIRED
02-25.subtitle: FIRST JERSEY RETIREMENT IN SHARKS HISTORY
02-25.description: Patrick Marleau's No. 12 becomes the first jersey retired in Sharks franchise history. San Jose declares it 'Patrick Marleau Day.' Barry Bonds and Chris Mullin join him on ice.

02-27.title: WARRIORS vs MAGIC
02-27.subtitle: CURRY ERUPTS FOR 56
02-27.description: Curry explodes for 56 points (12-of-19 from three, 12-of-12 FT) to lead a comeback from 14 down. His 14th career 50-point game and record 26th with 10+ threes.

02-27.title: WARRIORS vs THUNDER
02-27.subtitle: 73-9 SEASON · 32-FOOT GAME-WINNER
02-27.description: Curry scores 46 with 12 threes (tying the NBA record), then launches a 32-foot pull-up three with 0.6 seconds left in overtime for the win. One of the greatest regular-season games ever.

03-01.title: QUAKES vs SPORTING KC
03-01.subtitle: MLS 2025 · ROAD WIN
03-01.description: Chicho Arango and Josef Martinez each score as the Earthquakes win at Children's Mercy Park, starting the Bruce Arena era 2-0.

01-10.title: 49ERS vs COWBOYS
01-10.subtitle: NFC CHAMPIONSHIP
01-10.description: Dwight Clark makes 'The Catch' — Joe Montana's 6-yard TD pass in the final minute to win the NFC Championship and send the 49ers to their first Super Bowl.

10-29.title: GIANTS vs ROYALS
10-29.subtitle: WORLD SERIES · GAME 7
10-29.description: Madison Bumgarner throws 5 innings of scoreless relief as the Giants win their third World Series title in five years.

11-01.title: GIANTS vs RANGERS
11-01.subtitle: WORLD SERIES · GAME 4
11-01.description: Bumgarner's masterful 8 scoreless innings put the Giants one win from the title.

05-11.title: WARRIORS vs JAZZ
05-11.subtitle: WCSF · GAME 3
05-11.description: Baron Davis posterizes Andrei Kirilenko with one of the most ferocious dunks in NBA playoff history during the 'We Believe' run.

06-16.title: WARRIORS vs CELTICS
06-16.subtitle: NBA FINALS · GAME 6
06-16.description: Steph Curry scores 34 as the Warriors clinch their 4th championship. Curry wins his first Finals MVP.

06-16.title: WARRIORS vs CAVALIERS
06-16.subtitle: NBA FINALS · GAME 6
06-16.description: The Warriors clinch the NBA Championship — their first title in 40 years.

06-10.title: WARRIORS vs CELTICS
06-10.subtitle: NBA FINALS · GAME 4
06-10.description: Steph Curry erupts for 43 points in a must-win Game 4, keeping the Warriors alive in the Finals.

06-19.title: WARRIORS vs CAVALIERS
06-19.subtitle: NBA FINALS · GAME 7
06-19.description: The epic Game 7 where LeBron and the Cavaliers complete the first 3-1 comeback in Finals history.

11-20.title: CAL vs STANFORD
11-20.subtitle: THE BIG GAME
11-20.description: 'The Play' — Cal returns the kickoff through the Stanford band with five laterals for the most famous play in college football history.

01-22.title: 49ERS vs SAINTS
01-22.subtitle: NFC DIVISIONAL ROUND
01-22.description: Alex Smith hits Vernon Davis on a 14-yard TD strike with 9 seconds left in one of the greatest NFL playoff games ever played.
